Name: Security
Description: How well the system protects data and behavior from unauthorized access or misuse.

Name: Input Validation
Description: All external inputs are validated and sanitized before use.

Name: Least Privilege
Description: Components and users operate with the minimum privileges required.

Name: Authentication
Description: Verify the identity of users and services before granting access.

Name: Authorization
Description: Enforce fine-grained access control based on roles and permissions.

Name: Security Audit Logging
Description: Record security-relevant events for investigations and compliance.

Name: Secrets Management
Description: Safely store and rotate credentials API keys and certificates.

Name: Secure Defaults
Description: Ship with conservative settings that favor security over convenience.

Name: Injection Risk
Description: Dynamic queries or commands built from untrusted input without proper escaping.

Name: Insecure Deserialization
Description: Deserializing untrusted data without validation or type checks.
